member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Districts.Controllers.V1.DistrictsController.GetAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all districts with their parent state info.
member.remarks:
Returns every district record including the nested state object.
Permission required: Districts:View
member.response:
List returned successfully.
[ { "id" : 1, "nameAr" : "القاهرة الجديدة", "nameEn" : "New Cairo", "code" : "NC", "stateId" : 1, "state" : { "id": 1, "nameAr": "القاهرة", "nameEn": "Cairo", "code": "CAI", "isDeleted": false }, "createdOn" : "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z", "updatedOn" : null, "isDeleted" : false } ]
Unauthorized — missing or invalid JWT token.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Districts.Controllers.V1.DistrictsController.GetAllByState(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all active districts for a specific state.
member.remarks:
Use this to populate the Districts dropdown after the user selects a state. Only non-deleted districts are returned.
Permission required: Districts:View
UI usage: On state select → call this endpoint → bind results to the District dropdown.
Full cascading flow for address forms:
Load countries : GET /api/v1/countries
On country select → load states : GET /api/v1/states/by-country/{countryId}
On state select → load districts : GET /api/v1/districts/by-state/{stateId}
member.param: Token used to cancel the request.
member.returns: Array of DistrictResponse objects filtered to the given state.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Districts.Controllers.V1.DistrictsController.GetByID(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a single district by ID.
member.param: Token used to cancel the request.
member.response:
District found and returned.
{ "id" : 1, "nameAr" : "القاهرة الجديدة", "nameEn" : "New Cairo", "code" : "NC", "stateId" : 1, "state" : { "id": 1, "nameAr": "القاهرة", "nameEn": "Cairo", "code": "CAI", "isDeleted": false }, "createdOn" : "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z", "updatedOn" : null, "isDeleted" : false }
District with the given ID does not exist.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Districts.Controllers.V1.DistrictsController.GetDistrictWithAddresses(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a district with its full addresses list populated.
member.param: Token used to cancel the request.
member.returns: DistrictResponse with the addresses array fully populated.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Districts.Controllers.V1.DistrictsController.Add(HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Districts.Contracts.DistrictRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks:
Permission required: Districts:Create
Field rules:
FieldRequiredValidation
id ✅Always send 0 for new records.
nameAr ✅2–100 chars · unique within the same state.
nameEn ✅2–100 chars · unique within the same state.
code ✅2–10 chars · unique within the same state. e.g. NC, NR
stateId ✅Valid non-deleted state ID. DROPDOWN — load from GET /api/v1/states/by-country/{countryId}.
Note: Uniqueness for nameAr, nameEn, and code is scoped to the state — the same name can exist in two different states.
member.param:
DistrictRequest body (JSON). Send id = 0 for new records.
{ "id" : 0, "nameAr" : "القاهرة الجديدة", "nameEn" : "New Cairo", "code" : "NC", "stateId" : 1 }
Token used to cancel the request.
member.response: District created successfully. Returns the new district object.
Validation failed or stateId does not reference a valid state.
nameAr, nameEn, or code already exists within the same state.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Districts.Controllers.V1.DistrictsController.Update(HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Districts.Contracts.DistrictRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks:
Send the full object including the existing id. Same field rules as POST apply.
Permission required: Districts:Edit
member.param:
DistrictRequest body. id must be the existing record's ID.
{ "id" : 1, "nameAr" : "القاهرة الجديدة", "nameEn" : "New Cairo", "code" : "NC", "stateId" : 1 }
Token used to cancel the request.
member.response: District updated successfully. Returns the updated district object.
Validation failed or stateId is invalid.
District with the given id not found.
Name or code conflict within the same state.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Districts.Controllers.V1.DistrictsController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Toggle soft-delete state of a district (delete or restore).
member.remarks:
Soft delete only — sets IsDeleted = true. Calling again restores the record.
Cannot delete if the district has associated addresses.
Permission required: Districts:Delete
UI tip: On HTTP 400, show — "This district cannot be deleted because it has associated addresses."
member.param: Token used to cancel the request.
member.response: District is referenced by one or more addresses and cannot be deleted.

member.name: M:HrManagementSystem.Features.GeographicalInformation.Districts.Controllers.V1.DistrictsController.GetCount(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get the total count of active (non-deleted) districts.
member.remarks:
Permission required: Districts:View
Use this to display a summary card at the top of the Districts page.
